sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ سَمِيَّةُ طَبِيبَةً فِي مُسْتَشْفَى قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Samija radi kao ljekarica u bolnici blizu kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Samiyya works as a doctor in a hospital near her home.

sentences.arabic: تُفَحِّصُ الْمَرْضَى فِي الصَّبَاحِ وَتَكْتُبُ الْوَصَفَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ujutro pregledava pacijente i piše recepte.
sentences.translationEn: She examines patients in the morning and writes prescriptions.

sentences.arabic: تَأْكُلُ غَدَاءَهَا مَعَ الزُّمَلَاءِ فِي الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ.
sentences.translationEn: She has lunch with colleagues during the break.

sentences.arabic: تَشْعُرُ بِالرِّضَا حِينَ يَخْرُجُ الْمَرِيضُ بِصِحَّةٍ جَيِّدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Osjeća zadovoljstvo kad pacijent izađe zdravo.
sentences.translationEn: She feels satisfied when a patient leaves in good health.
